etymology.description: 彳(彳) (chì, "step") + 复(复) (fù, "repeat") = walk back and forth -> return; repeat
etymology.interpretation: 復(復) (fù, "return; repeat") incorporates 彳(彳) (chì, "step"), indicating movement, with the phonetic 复(复) (fù, "repeat"), symbolizing the action of going back and forth or repeating an action.
etymology.simplification: 復(復) was simplified to 复(復) by replacing 彳(彳) (chì, "step") with a simpler component.

examples.chinese: 他已经复习功课(他已經複習功課)。
examples.english: He has already reviewed his lessons.

examples.chinese: 明天我们会复返到这里(明天我們會復返到這裡)。
examples.pinyin: Míngtiān wǒmen huì fùfǎn dào zhèlǐ.

examples.chinese: 她每天都重复同样的事情(她每天都重複同樣的事情)。
examples.pinyin: Tā měitiān dōu chóngfù tóngyàng de shìqíng.
examples.english: She repeats the same things every day.
